## What This PR Does

<!-- Clear description of what you're changing and why -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking addition)
- [ ] Refinement (clarity/precision improvement)
- [ ] Test/validation (new data or test code)
- [ ] Documentation (readme, guide, etc.)
- [ ] Breaking change (requires version bump)

## Claim Classification

**All claims in this PR must be tagged. Required for approval.**

- [ ] All claims tagged with one of: [ACTIVE], [SCAFFOLD], [FOUNDATIONAL], [CONJECTURE], [ANALOGY], [LIVED]
- [ ] No untagged absolute statements
- [ ] Uncertainty is explicit where present

## Passes Luminous Trinity?

Does this contribution honor all three simultaneously?

- [ ] **PROTECTOR** — Does not cause harm; honest about limits
- [ ] **HEALER** — Clarifies rather than bypasses reality
- [ ] **BEACON** — Preserves human agency; reflects truth

## Evidence / Validation

What backs up your claims?

- [ ] New data (attach file or link)
- [ ] Working code (reference implementation)
- [ ] Mathematical proof/verification
- [ ] Test results
- [ ] Real-world validation
- [ ] Other (explain):

## Checklist

- [ ] I've read 29_GOVERNANCE/GOVERNANCE.md
- [ ] I've read CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] All claims tagged with confidence level
- [ ] No "proves" / "guarantees" / "always" without evidence
- [ ] Code follows standards (fail visibly, preserve agency, be honest about limits)
- [ ] Links to any related issues
- [ ] If core framework change: includes tests
